topic.what: Reactive detection framework that generalizes from a single observed exploit to detect imitative DeFi attack cascades
topic.how: Source-code semantic extraction and contract-label-based logic matching with Asymmetrical Normalized Set Difference (ANSD) similarity metric
topic.why_matters: Over 69% of DeFi attacks are imitations of prior exploits causing >$2B losses; current reactive systems lack generalization capability to rapidly convert new exploits into detection patterns

characteristics.what_it_measures: Attack detection accuracy on DeFiHackLab benchmark
Rate of benign transactions incorrectly flagged as attacks
Rate of actual attacks missed by the system

characteristics.what_itasures: Detection rate on held-out attacks from Phalcon not seen during training
characteristics.evidence: Zero-shot evaluation on Phalcon dataset (726 incidents)
characteristics.context: Significantly outperforms Forta (65%), DeFiRanger (44%), TxSpector (31%), POMABuster (28%)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Detection rate on DeFiHackLab held-out attacks (cross-domain validation)
characteristics.evidence: Zero-shot evaluation on independent DeFiHackLab dataset
characteristics.context: Validates generalization across independent datasets; slight drop from 76% to 73% indicates robustness

characteristics.what_it_measures: Previously undisclosed attacks discovered from real Ethereum transaction data
characteristics.evidence: Discovered from ~3M DEX transactions spanning Jan 2021-Dec 2024, verified via Tornado Cash usage, bridge activity, and contract creation patterns
characteristics.context: 56 previously unrevealed attacks involving >$1.5M in losses; conservative filtering to exclude MEV/arbitrage

characteristics.evidence: Parallel transaction-level processing; supports Solana average load (1,133 TPS)
characteristics.context: Fully parallelizable design; scales horizontally for higher demands

characteristics.what_it_measures: Per-transaction analysis time for trace similarity computation
characteristics.evidence: O(M+N) complexity where M and N are rule and target trace lengths; worst-case bounded at 0.7s
characteristics.context: Average latency under 0.02s for semantic extraction; global average ~0.1s for logic matching; worst-case 0.7s for 800-length traces
